kvkk.title: Data Protection Notice
kvkk.subtitle: Personal Data Protection Compliance
kvkk.intro: This Data Protection Notice outlines how we handle your personal data in compliance with applicable data protection laws and regulations.

dataController.title: 1. Data Controller
dataController.content:
Omer Faruk Ozadali
Address: Istanbul, Turkey
Email: ozadaliomerfaruk@gmail.com

processedData.title: 2. Personal Data Processed
processedData.intro: The following personal data may be processed within the scope of the application:
processedData.financialItems: Business account records manually entered by user
processedData.technicalItems: Technical records created for system security and service provision

purposes.title: 3. Purposes of Processing Personal Data
purposes.intro: Your personal data is processed for the following purposes:
purposes.items:
Managing membership and account operations
Providing application services
Enabling financial recording and reporting functions
Managing information security processes
Fulfilling legal obligations

legalBasis.title: 4. Legal Grounds
legalBasis.intro: Your personal data is processed based on the following legal grounds under applicable data protection laws:
legalBasis.items:
Direct relevance to the establishment or performance of a contract
Fulfillment of data controller's legal obligations
Establishment, exercise, or protection of a right
Legitimate interests of the data controller
legalBasis.consent: Explicit consent is obtained only when necessary.

transfer.title: 5. Transfer of Personal Data
transfer.intro: Your personal data may be transferred to:
transfer.items:
Authorized public institutions and organizations in cases of legal obligation
Technical infrastructure and cloud service providers
transfer.outro: in accordance with applicable data protection regulations.

rights.title: 6. Data Subject Rights
rights.intro: Under applicable data protection laws, you have the right to:
rights.items:
a) Learn whether your personal data is processed
b) Request information about processing if processed
c) Learn the purpose of processing and whether data is used accordingly
d) Know third parties to whom data is transferred
e) Request correction if data is incomplete or incorrect
f) Request deletion or destruction
g) Request notification of these operations to third parties
h) Object to results that arise against you
i) Request compensation for damages

application.title: 7. Application Method
application.intro: To exercise your rights, you may apply via:
application.email:
Email: ozadaliomerfaruk@gmail.com
Subject: Data Protection Request
application.outro: Your applications will be concluded free of charge within 30 days at the latest.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By using the Business Tracker application, you agree to the following terms.

serviceDescription.title: 1. Service Description
serviceDescription.content:
Business Tracker is a financial tracking and management application developed for small and medium-sized businesses. The application offers income-expense tracking, client account management, staff records and payment tracking, and financial reporting tools.

The application does not provide official accounting, payroll, tax, or legal advisory services.

usageTerms.title: 2. Usage Terms and Age Restriction
usageTerms.content:
You must be at least 13 years old to use this application. Use of the application by individuals under 13 is prohibited.

Users are responsible for the accuracy, currency, and legal compliance of all data entered into the application. Business Tracker cannot be held responsible for consequences arising from incorrect or incomplete data entry.

accountSecurity.title: 3. Account Security
accountSecurity.content: Users are obligated to keep account information confidential and prevent unauthorized access. Users are responsible for all transactions performed through their account.

dataSecurity.title: 4. Data Security
dataSecurity.content: User data is stored on secure servers with reasonable technical security measures. However, it is acknowledged that data transmission over the internet is not completely risk-free.

accountDeletion.title: 5. Account Deletion
accountDeletion.content: Users can delete their account through Settings > Delete My Account menu within the application. A 7-day waiting period applies after account deletion request. Users can cancel the deletion during this period. After the waiting period, the account and all associated data are permanently deleted and cannot be recovered.

thirdParty.title: 6. Third-Party Services
thirdParty.content: The application may use third-party services such as Apple ID and Google Account for authentication. Use of these services is subject to the respective service providers' own terms of use.

serviceChanges.title: 7. Service Changes
serviceChanges.content: Business Tracker reserves the right to change the application's service content, features, and pricing without prior notice.

intellectualProperty.title: 8. Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.content: The design, software, and brand elements of Business Tracker application belong to Business Tracker. Ownership of all data entered into the application by users belongs to the users.

liability.title: 9. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: Business Tracker cannot be held liable for indirect damages arising from use of the application. The application is provided "as is."

disputes.title: 10. Dispute Resolution
disputes.content: Any disputes arising from these terms shall be governed by applicable law, and resolved through binding arbitration or in the courts of the jurisdiction where the service provider is located.

contact.title: 11. Contact
contact.content:
For questions about terms of use:
ozadaliomerfaruk@gmail.com

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At Business Tracker, we value your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how personal data collected through our mobile application is processed, protected, and users' rights.

identity.title: 1.1 Identity and Account Information
identity.content:
Email address
Authentication information (passwords are not visible to or stored by the application developer; they are processed through secure authentication infrastructure)

userContent.title: 1.2 User-Entered Content
userContent.intro: The following information is entered entirely at user's discretion and manually:
userContent.content:
Financial records (bank accounts, cash, income-expense records)
Client account information (customer and supplier information)
Staff information
Descriptions, notes, and similar content

optional.title: 1.3 Optional Information
optional.content: Tax number and similar fields are not mandatory and are entered optionally by users.

dataUsage.title: 2. Data Usage Purposes
dataUsage.intro: Collected data is processed for the following purposes:
dataUsage.items:
Providing application functions
Account and session management
Creating financial records and reports
Resolving technical issues
Fulfilling legal obligations
dataUsage.outro: Data is not used for advertising, marketing, or user tracking purposes.

appStore.title: 3. Data Relationship with User (Apple App Store Perspective)
appStore.content:
Identity and account information is associated with user account.
Financial records, client, and staff information entered by users belong to content created within user's account, not to users themselves.
This data is accessible only by the relevant user.

dataSecurity.title: 4. Data Security
dataSecurity.intro: The following measures are taken for personal data security:
dataSecurity.items:
SSL/TLS encrypted data transmission
Secure server infrastructure
Authorization and access control mechanisms
Technical measures to prevent unauthorized access

thirdParty.title: 5. Third-Party Service Providers
thirdParty.intro: The application may utilize the following service providers:
thirdParty.items:
Authentication services (Apple ID, Google Account)
Database and authentication infrastructure (Supabase)
Cloud hosting services
thirdParty.outro:
These service providers can access data only for the purpose of fulfilling application functions and to a limited extent.

All third-party service providers are obligated to provide protection equal to or higher than the level specified in this Privacy Policy for user data.

retention.title: 6. Data Retention Period and Account Deletion
retention.content:
Data is retained as long as user account is active.
Users can delete their account from within the application.
A 7-day waiting period applies after account deletion request.
After the waiting period, account and all associated data are automatically and permanently deleted.
For users signing in with Apple ID, Apple authentication tokens are also revoked during account deletion.

children.title: 7. Children's Privacy
children.content: The application is not intended for children under 13. Personal data from children is not knowingly collected.

userRights.title: 8. User Rights
userRights.intro: Users have the following rights under applicable regulations:
userRights.items:
Right to access their data
Right to request correction
Right to request deletion
Right to object to processing

contact.title: 9. Contact
contact.content:
For questions about privacy policy:
ozadaliomerfaruk@gmail.com
